zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Longchamp I於大約1118年出生在法國諾門迪艾時，他的父親Henry de Longchamp50歲，母親Unknown50歲。他和Eve de Lacy至少有8個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1187年10月25日在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Longchamp I于大约1118年出生在法国諾門迪艾时，他的父亲Henry de Longchamp50岁，母亲Unknown50岁。他和Eve de Lacy至少有8个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1187年10月25日在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯凱享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Longchamp I was born about 1118, in Eure, Normandy, France, his father, Henry de Longchamp, was 50 and his mother, Unknown, was 50. He had at least 8 sons and 2 daughters with Eve de Lacy. He died on 25 October 1187, in Caen, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Longchamp I est né environ 1118, à Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Henry de Longchamp, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Unknown, avait 50 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles avec Eve de Lacy. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1187, à Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Longchamp I um 1118 in Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Longchamp 50 und seine Mutter Unknown 50. Er hatte mit Eve de Lacy mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1187 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Longchamp I è nato il circa 1118 nel Eure, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Henry de Longchamp, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Unknown, aveva 50 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie con Eve de Lacy. Morì il 25 ottobre 1187, nel Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Longchamp Iが約1118年にフランスノーマンディエウアで生まれた時，父Henry de Longchampは50歳，母Unknownは50歳であった。彼はEve de Lacyとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1187年10月25日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスケンで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Longchamp I(이)가 대략 1118년 프랑스 노먼디 우르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Longchamp(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Unknown(은)는 50세였다. 그는 Eve de Lacy(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1187년 10월 25일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 카이에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Longchamp I nasceu aproximadamente 1118, em Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Henry de Longchamp, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Unknown, tinha 50 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas com Eve de Lacy. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1187, em Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Longchamp I родился около 1118 г. в местности эур, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Henry de Longchamp было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Unknown, 50. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери от Eve de Lacy. Он умер 25 октября 1187 г. в местности каен, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Longchamp I nació aproximadamente 1118, en Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Henry de Longchamp, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Unknown, tenía 50 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas con Eve de Lacy. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1187, en Caen, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 70 años.
